response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong full-stack and infrastructure experience with exposure to AI-agent workflows and MCP, though his direct GenAI/RAG experience is limited. His leadership in technical projects and open-source contributions suggests potential for the role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud platforms (AWS).
Proven leadership in technical projects, including open-source AI-agent infrastructure (MCP).
Strong background in designing scalable systems and developer tooling.
concerns: Limited explicit experience with vector databases and RAG architectures.
GenAI experience is secondary to his broader software engineering focus.
No advanced degree (PhD/Master's) in AI or related fields, though this is preferred, not required.
